# ClawPilot - Openclaw Easy Setup

> ClawPilot is managed Openclaw hosting for people searching for "Openclaw easy setup", "easy Openclaw setup", and "easy open claw setup".

## Summary

ClawPilot lets users run Openclaw without local hardware, server maintenance, or manual setup. Create an account, connect channels, and start delegating tasks in chat.

## Canonical Pages

- Homepage: https://clawpilot.app
- Blog: https://clawpilot.app/blog
- Openclaw hosting: https://clawpilot.app/openclaw-hosting
- Managed Openclaw: https://clawpilot.app/managed-openclaw
- Openclaw VPS hosting: https://clawpilot.app/openclaw-vps-hosting
- Openclaw WhatsApp automation: https://clawpilot.app/openclaw-whatsapp-automation

## Core Capabilities

- Managed Openclaw hosting with updates and uptime handled by ClawPilot.
- Easy setup workflow for non-technical users.
- Multi-channel support (WhatsApp, Telegram, Slack, Discord, Signal, iMessage, Teams, WebChat).
- Permission-aware controls and confirmation gates.

## References

- Openclaw GitHub: https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw
- Clawhub: https://clawhub.ai
